question: Which year from 2011-2016 has the lowest death rate for ages 1-4 in the United States? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: A pediatric health researcher wants the lowest early-childhood mortality year in the 2010s.

1.fact: Filtering to Age Group = "1-4 Years" for 2011-2016, the minimum Death Rate is 24.0 in 2014.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2011-2016 has the lowest death rate for ages 1-4 in the United States? (Filter Age Group == "1-4 Years"; select the minimum Death Rate.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which year from 2011-2016 has the lowest death rate for ages 1-4? (Filter Age Group == "1-4 Years"; select the minimum Death Rate.) The answer is 2014.
